input: How much is the fee if I cancel after my order has already shipped?
expected_answer: A 10% restocking fee applies, deducted from your refund, if you cancel after the order has shipped but before delivery.

input: If I change my mind ten minutes after placing an order, do I get charged anything to cancel?
expected_answer: No. Cancellation within 1 hour of placing the order is free with no fee.

input: Can I still cancel once the package has been delivered?
expected_answer: No. After delivery, cancellation is no longer available through this process. Use the standard 30-day return and refund process instead.

input: Where in my account do I go to see the cancellation fee for a specific order?
expected_answer: Log in to your account portal, go to My Orders, select the order, and open the Cancel Order option. The fee, if any, is shown before you confirm.

input: Please cancel order ORD-1001.
expected_answer: Your order was placed within the last hour, so it's been cancelled for free with no fee.

input: I want to cancel ORD-1003, what happens to my money?
expected_answer: This order has already shipped, so a 10% restocking fee of $12.00 applies, deducted from your refund.

input: Cancel ORD-1005 for me please.
expected_answer: This order has already been cancelled.

input: I need to cancel ORD-1002 please.
expected_answer: Your order hasn't shipped yet, so it's been cancelled for free. This will be processed within 1 business day.

input: I want to cancel my order.
expected_answer: The agent should ask for the order number, and escalate to a human when the customer does not supply one.

input: How do I unsubscribe from your newsletter?
expected_answer: Provide the email address you used to subscribe, or your account details, and your unsubscribe request will be processed.

input: What information do you need from me to cancel my newsletter subscription?
expected_answer: The email address you used to subscribe, or your account details if you have an account.

input: I'd like to sign up for the newsletter.
expected_answer: Provide your email address and you will be subscribed. Your information is treated confidentially.

input: Will I stop getting emails immediately after I unsubscribe?
expected_answer: Your unsubscribe request is processed promptly and you will no longer receive newsletters.

input: Can I unsubscribe without giving my email address?
expected_answer: An email address or account details are needed to locate the subscription and process the unsubscribe request.

input: How do I track where my order is right now?
expected_answer: Visit the Order Tracking section on the website, which shows the current status and location of your order.

input: What are the steps to cancel an order from my account portal?
expected_answer: Log in to your account portal, go to My Orders, select the order, click Cancel Order, and confirm. Any applicable fee is shown before you confirm.

input: I want to add another item to an order I already placed.
expected_answer: Provide the details of the item you would like to add so the order can be updated.

input: Track order ORD-1002 for me.
expected_answer: This order is placed. Estimated delivery: 3-5 business days via standard shipping.

input: What's the status of ORD-1006?
expected_answer: This order is set for in-store pickup - it'll be ready to collect at your local store rather than shipped.

input: Where is ORD-1004?
expected_answer: This order has already been delivered.

input: Can you check ORD-9999 for me?
expected_answer: No order exists with that ID, so the request should be escalated to a human rather than guessed at.

input: Please cancel ORD-8888 immediately.
expected_answer: No order exists with that ID, so the request should be escalated to a human rather than guessed at.

input: How long does standard shipping take?
expected_answer: Standard shipping typically takes 3-5 business days.

input: What's the fastest shipping option you offer?
expected_answer: Overnight shipping, which provides next-day delivery.

input: Do you ship internationally?
expected_answer: Yes. International shipping is available to countries including Jordan, the UAE, and Germany.

input: Can I pick my order up in a store instead of having it shipped?
expected_answer: Yes. In-Store Pickup lets you collect your items at a retail store location instead of having them shipped.

input: How long do I have to request a refund after delivery?
expected_answer: You have a 30-day refund window from delivery.

input: I was charged twice for the same item, can I get a refund?
expected_answer: Yes. Duplicate charges qualify for a refund; contact support so the situation can be rectified.

input: What do I need to provide to request a refund?
expected_answer: The reason for the refund and your order number or relevant payment/transaction details.

input: How can I check the status of my refund?
expected_answer: Provide your order number or relevant refund details and support will check the current status of the refund for you.

input: If my package never arrives, am I entitled to a refund?
expected_answer: Yes. Failed delivery or non-delivery of goods within the expected time frame may qualify you for a refund.

input: Which payment methods do you accept?
expected_answer: Credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, bank transfers, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.

input: Do you take Apple Pay?
expected_answer: Yes, Apple Pay is an accepted payment method.

input: My payment failed, what should I do?
expected_answer: Contact the customer support team through the contact page or the support hotline; they will gather the details and help resolve the payment issue.

input: Can I pay with a bank transfer?
expected_answer: Yes. Direct bank transfers are accepted, allowing payment straight from your bank account.

input: How do I create an account?
expected_answer: Visit www.meridianretail.com, click Sign Up or Create Account, provide your name, email address, and a password, then accept the terms and confirm.

input: I forgot my password, how do I reset it?
expected_answer: Go to the account recovery page, choose the Forgot option, verify your identity through the security questions, and follow the emailed instructions to set a new one.

input: How do I upgrade to a Premium account?
expected_answer: Log in, go to Settings or Profile, choose Upgrade Account or Change Account Type, select Premium, and follow the prompts to finalize.

input: I'm getting errors when I try to sign up.
expected_answer: Provide details about the specific errors encountered during sign-up so the support team can identify the root cause and resolve it.

input: How do I change the delivery address on my account?
expected_answer: Log in to your account on the website and go to the Shipping Address section to make the changes, or contact customer support for help.

input: Where do I add a new shipping address?
expected_answer: Log in, go to My Account or Profile, open Shipping Addresses, choose Add a New Address, fill in the required fields, and save.

input: I entered my address wrong, can I fix it?
expected_answer: Yes. Log in to your account, go to the Shipping Address section, and edit the address, or contact customer support for assistance.

input: What fields do I need to fill in for a new delivery address?
expected_answer: The recipient's name, street name, city, state, postal code, and contact information.

input: Where can I find my invoice?
expected_answer: Log in to your account and navigate to the Billing or Invoices section; a digital copy is also emailed to the address on your account.

input: How do I download a copy of my invoice?
expected_answer: Log in to your account, go to the Billing or Invoices section, and view or download the invoice directly from your account.

input: I can't find the invoice email you sent.
expected_answer: Check your spam or junk folder first; if it still isn't there, contact support at 1-800-555-0199 or via Live Chat to retrieve it.

input: Can I get an invoice if I don't have an account?
expected_answer: Provide your full name and email address and support can help you create an account, from which you can view and download the invoice.

input: What's your customer service phone number?
expected_answer: The toll-free customer service number is 1-800-555-0199.

input: What hours is your support team available?
expected_answer: Support is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 7 PM EST.

input: I want to talk to a real person, not a bot.
expected_answer: You can reach a human agent by phone at 1-800-555-0199, by email at support@meridianretail.com, or through live chat on the website.

input: Can I reach you by email?
expected_answer: Yes, you can email the support team at support@meridianretail.com.

input: How do I file a complaint?
expected_answer: Provide the specific details of your complaint so it can be documented and routed to the relevant team for review.

input: I want to leave a review of a product I bought.
expected_answer: Provide details about the product and your experience; you can also submit feedback via the Contact Us form on the website, by phone, or by email.

input: Where do I submit feedback about my experience?
expected_answer: Through the feedback form in the Contact Us section of www.meridianretail.com, or by phone at 1-800-555-0199 or email at support@meridianretail.com.

input: How do I make a formal claim against your company?
expected_answer: Provide the specific details of your claim so it can be properly documented and reviewed by the relevant team.

input: What's your company's stock ticker symbol and current share price?
expected_answer: Out of scope for the support corpus. The agent should not guess; it should escalate to a human.

input: Could you walk me through the tax implications of expensing this purchase as a business deduction?
expected_answer: Out of scope for the support corpus. The agent should not guess; it should escalate to a human.

input: asdkjh asd kjahsd lkjh
expected_answer: Unintelligible input. The agent should ask for clarification and then escalate when the reply is still unclear.

input: I need help with the thing we discussed.
expected_answer: Too ambiguous to act on. The agent should ask for clarification and then escalate when the reply is still unclear.

input: What is your official position on the labor dispute at your supplier's factory?
expected_answer: Out of scope for the support corpus. The agent should not guess; it should escalate to a human.
